nonclaims: P48 does not complete a BayesFilter rewrite.
P48 does not claim adaptive Zhao-Cui source-route equivalence for current BayesFilter code.
P48 does not claim paper-scale SIR or predator-prey production readiness.
P48 does not claim adaptive TT/SIRT differentiability for HMC.
P48 does not treat analytical-gradient necessity as permission to label an ad hoc replacement source-faithful.

decisions.difference: Adaptive TT cross/ALS with random enrichment and rank truncation versus deterministic fixed-rank weighted ridge ALS on declared designs.
decisions.next_action: Implement clean-room adaptive TT/SIRT filtering lane; preserve fixed branch as deterministic gradient lane.
required_tests: SIR and predator-prey small ladders after route rewrite
nonclaims: Current fixed-rank ALS is not source-route equivalent.

decisions.difference: Source retains SIRT/TTSIRT transport objects, affine maps, samples, and weights; BayesFilter retains all-axes dense/TT grid payloads.
decisions.next_action: Rewrite filtering lane around retained transport/density objects rather than tensor-product grids.
nonclaims: All-axes retained grid is not a paper-scale SIR route.

decisions.difference: Sample/ESS-driven propagation and reapproximation versus pairwise transition density between retained grids.
decisions.next_action: Do not retry high-dimensional M4b with pairwise all-grid propagation; implement source-faithful proposal/reapproximation first.
nonclaims: Finite tiny-grid results do not imply production scalability.

decisions.bayesfilter_anchor: bayesfilter/highdim/filtering.py fixed-branch value paths; bayesfilter/highdim/fitting.py residual and holdout gates
decisions.difference: Source uses particle correction, ESS, resampling, and enhanced sampling; BayesFilter uses deterministic quadrature/fitting diagnostics.
decisions.next_action: Add ESS/correction mechanics to source-faithful lane.
nonclaims: BayesFilter residual gates are not ESS substitutes.

decisions.difference: Sample-derived affine maps and preconditioner compositions versus declared fixed windows and grid CDF helpers.
decisions.next_action: Implement source-style recentering in filtering lane; keep fixed declared windows in gradient lane.
nonclaims: A fixed coordinate window is not equivalent to sample-derived recentering.

decisions.difference: Source implements preconditioner/residual SIRT variants; BayesFilter has diagnostics and bounded fixtures but not the full preconditioned solver.
decisions.next_action: Prioritize clean-room preconditioned lane for predator-prey repair.
nonclaims: P47 M5b failure is not evidence against the source preconditioned algorithm.

decisions.difference: Source includes smoothing via conditional/inverse transports and weights; BayesFilter highdim route does not implement the full smoother.
decisions.next_action: Exclude smoothing claims until a dedicated smoother plan exists.
nonclaims: Filtering likelihood tests do not validate smoothing.

decisions.difference: Source has TTSIRT marginal recursion and z accounting; BayesFilter has validated helpers with explicit limitations for integrated axes.
decisions.next_action: Run analytic density and low-dimensional marginal/conditional tests before promoting generic marginalization.
nonclaims: Current helper limitations are not proof that the source route is unavailable.

decisions.source_anchor: adaptive random enrichment, ESS resampling, SVD rank truncation in source route
decisions.bayesfilter_anchor: bayesfilter/highdim/fitting.py branch manifests; P42/P43 gradient validation rules
decisions.difference: Source route is adaptive and random; BayesFilter fixed branch is deterministic and replayable. This supports a separate gradient-bearing lane, not a claim of source fidelity.
decisions.next_action: Keep HMC experiments on fixed branch unless a separate differentiable adaptive-route design is approved; label changed routes as gradient-bearing adaptations, not source-faithful Zhao-Cui.
nonclaims: Adaptive source route is not declared globally differentiable.
Analytical-gradient necessity does not make an ad hoc route source-faithful.

decisions.difference: Source paper-scale SIR uses adaptive/random TT/SIRT with samples; BayesFilter M4b attempted all-grid multistate retained propagation.
decisions.next_action: Rebuild route before M4b production retry.
required_tests: J=9 preflight without pairwise grid explosion
nonclaims: M4b is blocked by BayesFilter route architecture, not by the source paper route.

decisions.difference: Source has bounded and preconditioned adaptive solvers; BayesFilter fixed-design candidate failed production accuracy/tuning tolerances.
decisions.next_action: Implement preconditioned clean-room lane and compare to existing fixed branch on matched small targets.
required_tests: moment and log-likelihood tolerance with Monte Carlo uncertainty
nonclaims: P47 M5b does not disprove Zhao-Cui predator-prey performance.

decisions.difference: SV has useful transformed/Kalman/mixture comparators, but those are calibration tests and do not prove high-dimensional source-route scalability.
decisions.next_action: Use SV as a calibration ladder for values and gradients, not as a proxy production proof.
required_tests: exact transformed z_t likelihood where applicable
nonclaims: SV success does not imply SIR or predator-prey production readiness.

decisions.difference: MATLAB LGPL/GPL-family source is a reference input; BayesFilter production code defaults to TensorFlow/TFP.
nonclaims: No permission to copy MATLAB implementation into production modules.

decisions.source_anchor: P34 notes examples are scripts, not production tests
decisions.difference: BayesFilter has stronger governance but some claims risk conflating source audit with implementation equivalence.
decisions.next_action: Patch result language and make future pass tokens route-specific.
nonclaims: A governance pass token is not an algorithmic equivalence proof.
